title: 6pk Acrylic Paint Set Pastel Artist Art Beginner Painting 75ml Tube Wood Canvas
features: This versatile set is perfect for artists of all levels, offering vibrant pastel colours in convenient 75ml tubes. The water-based formula dries quickly and is ideal for use on various surfaces like paper, canvas, and wood.
6 beautiful pastel shades: Pink, Blue, Yellow, Green, Peach, and Lavender.
Large 75ml tubes: Provide ample paint for your projects.
Water-based and quick drying: Easy to clean up and work with.
Versatile application: Suitable for paper, canvas, and wood.
description: This versatile set is perfect for artists of all levels, offering vibrant pastel colours in convenient 75ml tubes. The water-based formula dries quickly and is ideal for use on various surfaces like paper, canvas, and wood. Here's what makes this set special: 6 beautiful pastel shades: Pink, Blue, Yellow, Green, Peach, and Lavender. Large 75ml tubes: Provide ample paint for your projects. Water-based and quick drying: Easy to clean up and work with. Versatile application: Suitable for paper, canvas, and wood. Whether you're a seasoned artist or just starting out, this set is a great way to explore the world of acrylic painting. Experiment with different techniques, blend colours to create unique hues, and bring your artistic vision to life!
